xwikidoc.name: Translations
xwikidoc.creator: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.author: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.title: Translations
xwikidoc.content: sopManager.name=SOP Manager sopManager.addPage.label=Add the current page to the review process sopManager.addPage.hint=Register this procedure in the review and approval process and manage reviewers, approval status, revisions, and revision dates. sopManager.addPage.button.label=Start review sopManager.addPage.added=Page added to review. sopManager.reviewPage.submitForReview.label=Submit for review sopManager.reviewPage.submitForReview.title=Submit for review sopManager.reviewPage.submitForReview.error=Please select the review user before submitting the current document for review. sopManager.reviewPage.submitForReview.success=The document was submitted for review and « {0} » will receive soon a notification. sopManager.reviewPage.submitForApproval.label=Submit for approval sopManager.reviewPage.submitForApproval.title=Submit for approval sopManager.reviewPage.submitForApproval.error=Please select the approval user before submitting the current document for approval. sopManager.reviewPage.submitForApproval.success=The document was submitted for approval and « {0} » will receive soon a notification. sopManager.reviewPage.returnForChanges.label=Return for changes sopManager.reviewPage.returnForChanges.title=Return for changes sopManager.reviewPage.returnForChanges.success=The document was returned for changes and « {0} » will receive soon a notification. sopManager.reviewPage.approve.label=Approve sopManager.reviewPage.approve.title=Approve sopManager.reviewPage.approve.success=The document was approved. sopManager.reviewPage.generatePDF.label=Generate PDF sopManager.reviewPage.generatePDF.title=Generate PDF sopManager.reviewPage.returnToDraft.label=Return to draft sopManager.reviewPage.returnToDraft.title=Return to draft sopManager.reviewPage.previousRevisions.label=Previous revisions PDFs sopManager.reviewPage.submitForReview=Submitted for review. sopManager.reviewPage.returnForChanges=Returned for changes. sopManager.reviewPage.submitForApproval=Submitted for approval.
